arts.ttl: Bologna vs. Borussia Dormund: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will continue their quest for a spot in the UEFA Champions League knockout stages when they travel to Italy to face Bologna for the penultimate game of the league phase on Tuesday (kick-off: 9pm CET). In the Champions League for the first time in their history, Bologna suffered a difficult summer that saw them lose star players Joshua Zirkzee and Riccardo Calafiori to the English Premier League, while head coach Thiago Motta departed for Juventus.
